schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year cashless health coverage for all WB families
schemes.benefit_hi: पश्चिम बंगाल के सभी परिवारों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा
schemes.eligibility: All West Bengal families (smart card issued)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 1,000/year scholarship + Rs 25,000 one-time grant for girls
schemes.eligibility: WB girl students aged 13-18, family income < Rs 1.2 lakh

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 10,000/acre/year crop support + Rs 2 lakh death benefit
schemes.eligibility: WB farmers with minimum 0.01 acre land

schemes.benefit_en: Affordable flats and houses for EWS/LIG groups in WB
schemes.benefit_hi: EWS/LIG समूह के लिए किफायती फ्लैट
schemes.eligibility: WB EWS/LIG families without own house
